title: Experiment 001: Compute-Driven Particle Field
description: A WebGPU-first particle system with compute-driven simulation, a WebGL2 fallback, and static compatibility mode.
whatDemonstrates: WebGPU compute pass updates particle velocity and position each frame.
Graceful renderer tier fallback: WebGPU -> WebGL2 -> static.
Unified diagnostics stream for FPS, frame time, and capability reporting.
Prompt and pointer inputs influencing runtime simulation parameters.
